column1: # Use this file to silence known false positives or accepted risks.
# To use: uncomment the rules_file_name line in the workflow, then add rows below.
# Find alert IDs in the ZAP HTML report (the number in parentheses after each alert name).
# 10096  IGNORE    # Timestamp Disclosure — low signal, often noise
# 10020  IGNORE    # Missing Anti-clickjacking Header — acceptable if site has no forms
# 10038  IGNORE    # Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set — informational only
